components.name: stage-label
components.shape: white rounded rectangle or black capsule depending on background
components.usage: Section labels such as QUESTION, LLM, ANSWER or workflow phases.

components.name: qa-bubble
components.shape: small white rounded bubble with leading Q/A badge and placeholder text lines
components.usage: Question-answer piles, later regrouped into workflow categories.

components.name: workflow-circle
components.shape: large circle with thin stroke, sometimes overlapping or connected with vertical note lines

components.name: instruction-document
components.shape: document card with accumulating short rules

components.name: media-noise-bubble
components.shape: dark chat bubble without tail unless tail quality is deliberate
